projects.name: E-Learning Management App
projects.description: Designed and developed a cross-platform E-Learning application (Web, Android, Windows) inspired by Google Classroom. Enabled instructors and students to interact, manage, and track online learning. Features included dual roles (Instructor/Student), course/student management with CSV import, assignment/quiz system with deadlines and grading, discussion forum, chat, notifications, and a learning dashboard. Built with Flutter, integrated Firebase and SQLite for online/offline functionality. Implemented responsive UI for various devices.

projects.name: Movie Ticket Booking Website
projects.description: Designed and built a modern, intuitive movie ticket booking website. Key pages included Homepage, Movie List, Movie Details, Showtimes, Seat Selection, and Booking Confirmation. Features included movie listings with posters/trailers, detailed movie information, an intuitive seat selection system with status feedback, and a clear booking confirmation interface. Implemented responsive design for multi-platform compatibility and applied CSS effects for enhanced user experience.
